center.name: Carnarvon Gorge
center.summary: Carnarvon Gorge是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Australian king parrot，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Further from their normal eastern upland habitat, they are also found in Canberra during winter, the outer western and northern suburbs of Sydney, and the Carnarvon Gorge in central Queensland

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Further from their normal eastern upland habitat, they are also found in Canberra during winter, the outer western and northern suburbs of Sydney, and the Carnarvon Gorge in central Queensland
